summary: Completed comprehensive testing of banbansports UNDERGROUND HD cyberpunk sports streaming platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend UI mostly functional with minor JavaScript and image loading issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript error 'switchServer is not defined' when clicking server buttons

integration_issues.issue: Clearbit API logos not loading (0 of 15 sponsor images from Clearbit)
Maintenance overlay exists but hidden, showing loading spinner instead

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns success with message and version 2.0
Backend API /api/scores/live returns live score data (TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA)
Backend API /api/channels returns all 14 channels with proper status
Backend API /api/stream/health returns ok:true for test stream URL
Frontend loads with banbansports logo visible in cyberpunk style
All 14 channel tabs visible and clickable (DEMO 1, DEMO 2, REKLAM, TRT 1, TRT HABER, TV 8, TRT SPOR, beIN SPORTS 1, beIN SPORTS 2, S SPORT, GS TV, FB TV, ATV, A SPOR)
Quality selector button visible showing AUTO text
Volume slider (input range) visible in video controls when hovering
Connection indicator visible showing 5G text in video controls
Match center section with all 7 league filter buttons (TÜMÜ, SÜPER LİG, ŞAMPİYONLAR LİGİ, SERİE A, BUNDESLIGA, LA LİGA, PREMİER LİG)
Sponsor section shows all 15 sponsors with correct names including all 8 required: PAPARA, TOGG, DigiTürk, Turkcell, SIXT, SOCAR, MERİTKİNG, THY
Server selector shows 6 servers with Sunucu 1 initially active
Scanlines div present with class .scanlines for cyberpunk effects
SESİ AÇ (unmute) button visible on video area
Match banner shows live score data integration (TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA 0:0)
Cyberpunk theme with neon colors and glitch effects working perfectly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript error 'switchServer is not defined' for server switching functionality. Investigate Clearbit API image loading issues for sponsor logos. Verify beIN SPORTS 1 maintenance overlay display logic.
